title: Grammys 2026 Predictions: Record of the Year
text:
2026 Grammy Predictions: Record of the Year

Predicted Nominees:
Rolling Stone forecasts these eight songs in the Record of the Year category:

- Sabrina Carpenter, "Manchild"
- Playboi Carti & the Weeknd, "TIMELESS"
- Lady Gaga, "Abracadabra"
- Kendrick Lamar feat. SZA, "luther"
- Chappell Roan, "The Subway"
- ROSÉ & Bruno Mars, "APT."
- Tyler, the Creator feat. GloRilla, Sexyy Red, & Lil Wayne, "Sticky"
- Alex Warren, "Ordinary"

Who Will Win:
Kendrick Lamar feat. SZA, "luther"

The publication predicts back-to-back Record of the Year wins for Kendrick, who won previously for "Not Like Us." According to J.J. Italiano of Spotify, "When the moment is undeniable...those are the records that, more often than not, win."

Who Should Win:
ROS& & Bruno Mars, "APT."

The collaboration represents "an expertly crafted cut that fits the spirit of the category." Italiano praises its engineering, noting the pre-chorus arrangement represents "a master stroke."
